rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE ACQUISITION, LLC, A VS. DAN LU et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2011, line 1. Plaintiff San Francisco Office Acquisition, LLC's Motion for Attorney Fees and Expenses. Grant attorney fees in the amount of $100,350.00. = (501/REQ)
